checks.artifact: workflow logs and CLI version output

integrationMatrix.surface: SQL storage integrations for MySQL and PostgreSQL-backed generated or reference services
integrationMatrix.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: storage driver, transaction, outbox, generated model, or migration dependency changes
integrationMatrix.rollbackNote: pin the previous storage driver or generated profile until SQL integration logs and dependency upgrade evidence pass

integrationMatrix.surface: configuration and service discovery integrations for Consul, Nacos, and etcd-backed deployments
integrationMatrix.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: config loader, discovery resolver, watch, TLS, or client dependency changes
integrationMatrix.rollbackNote: pin the previous discovery client or disable the new profile until resolver update and health evidence pass

integrationMatrix.surface: message queue integrations for Kafka, RabbitMQ, and Redis Stream workflows
integrationMatrix.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: producer, consumer, retry, outbox, broker client, or serialization dependency changes
integrationMatrix.rollbackNote: pin the previous broker client or keep the prior outbox profile until broker integration evidence passes

integrationMatrix.surface: gateway, RPC, HTTP transcoding, and descriptor compatibility integrations
integrationMatrix.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: RPC descriptor, gateway routing, resolver, balancer, OpenAPI, or protobuf dependency changes
integrationMatrix.rollbackNote: pin the previous gateway or descriptor profile until resolver, routing, and transcoding evidence pass

integrationMatrix.surface: OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, runtime SLO, release evidence, and governance dashboard integrations
integrationMatrix.dependencyUpgradeTrigger: telemetry exporter, metrics, trace, release evidence, or governance report dependency changes
integrationMatrix.rollbackNote: pin the previous telemetry or governance evidence contract until dashboard and runtime SLO checks pass

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: release job needs, branch-protection expected checks, and local ci-fast gate must stay aligned before a tag is promoted
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when build-test is missing, skipped, or not represented in branch-protection expected checks

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: release job needs and branch-protection expected checks must keep both macOS and Windows platform smoke checks
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when either platform smoke row is missing or the targeted package smoke cannot run locally

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: release job needs, branch-protection expected checks, and local lint target must use the same lint gate
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when lint is removed from release needs or branch protection

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: security must remain release-blocking and cannot be skipped by governance job environment defaults
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when govulncheck or gosec evidence is missing or marked skipped

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: supply-chain must keep release artifact fixtures, public API compatibility skip governance, and OSV evidence aligned
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when API compatibility skip is forbidden but no report is uploaded

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: hosted CodeQL evidence must stay listed as a branch-protection check and release prerequisite
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when hosted CodeQL evidence is unavailable for the tag

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: dependency upgrade validation may delegate Docker-backed coverage only when the required integration matrix owns the same affected families
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: run make dependency-upgrade-check with integration enabled or block release promotion when delegated integration evidence is missing

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: stable-surface and API/RPC contract checks must remain release-blocking for candidate and Tier 1 surfaces
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when stable-surface evidence or API/RPC breaking reports are missing

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: governance skips must remain explicit, release-blocking skips must be rejected on tags, and compensating gates must be documented
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when race, security, or generated control-plane smoke is skipped without release-safe compensation

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: benchmark evidence, smoke, regression, trend, and fuzz smoke ordering must remain stable before release evidence upload
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when benchmark evidence is missing or regression budget checks fail

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: integration matrix areas, package lists, required checks, and dependency-upgrade delegation must stay aligned
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when any integration matrix row is missing or package coverage drifts from Makefile

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: Docker build evidence, Trivy results, release digest evidence, SBOM, and provenance attestation must remain release-consumable
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when Docker CI evidence or release Docker evidence is missing

releasePrerequisiteDrift.driftPolicy: Scorecard evidence must remain listed as a branch-protection check and release prerequisite
releasePrerequisiteDrift.fallbackPolicy: block release promotion when hosted Scorecard evidence is unavailable for the tag
